scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others -n "backend,frontend,ai,sandbox" -c "cyan,blue,magenta,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run start:ai" "npm run start:sandbox"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && pip install -r ai-service/requirements.txt && pip install -r sandbox-agent-v2/requirements.txt
scripts.test:all: npm test --prefix backend && npm run build:check --prefix backend && npm run build:check --prefix frontend
